title: Principal Plant Manager at Hitachi India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Hitachi India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India South Asia Partners:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India South Asia Partners!
